description: You are a cartographer preparing a base layer for a web mapping project. In the gvSIG project 'countries_base', change the Coordinate Reference System (CRS) of the view containing the Natural Earth 110m countries shapefile from WGS 84 (EPSG:4326) to Web Mercator (EPSG:3857). Save the updated project to /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/mercator_project.gvsproj.
